meta.title: 10 Days Golden Triangle + Manali from Malaysia | Dhesu Travel & Tours
meta.description: 10-day tour with Delhi, Taj Mahal, Jaipur, Shimla and Manali with Solang Valley and high passes, private vehicle. From RM2988 per person.
meta.keywords: 10 Days Golden Triangle + Manali from Malaysia, India tour package, North India tour package Malaysia, Dhesu travel

hero.title: 10 Days, Triangle & Manali.
hero.titleAccent: The Icons and the Himalayan Adventure.
hero.intro: Monuments and mountains in one grand tour. The Golden Triangle of Delhi, Agra and Jaipur, then north to the Himachal hills of Shimla and Manali, with snow peaks, the Beas river and high passes. Ten days of the very best of North India.
hero.heroImageAlt: Golden Triangle and Manali Himalayan tour

overview.heading: 10 Days Golden Triangle + Manali: The Full Picture
body: This 10 day grand tour combines the monumental Golden Triangle with the Himachal hills of Shimla and Manali. You experience Delhi, the Taj Mahal and Jaipur, then head north into the mountains for the colonial charm of Shimla and the snow peaks, adventure and high passes of Manali.

Arranged privately from Malaysia, the trip links the plains and the hills with your own vehicle and driver guide, with the Kalka-Shimla toy train and Solang Valley along the way. It is the ideal combination for travellers who want India's greatest monuments plus a proper Himalayan adventure, all at a comfortable pace.

highlights.heading: Why Travellers from Malaysia Love This Trip

items.title: The Golden Triangle Icons
items.body: Delhi's monuments, the Taj Mahal at sunrise and Jaipur's royal forts, the classic North India trio.

items.title: Shimla & the Toy Train
items.body: The colonial Mall Road of Shimla and the UNESCO-listed Kalka-Shimla toy train through the foothills.

items.title: Manali's Mountains
items.body: Solang Valley, the Beas river, hot springs and high passes, the snow-peaked heart of Himachal adventure.

days.title: Arrive Delhi
days.description: Met at the airport and transferred to your hotel.

days.title: Delhi, Drive to Agra
days.description: Old and New Delhi, then drive to Agra.

days.title: Taj Mahal, Drive to Jaipur
days.description: Sunrise Taj, Agra Fort, then to Jaipur via Fatehpur Sikri.

days.title: Jaipur Sightseeing
days.description: A full day in the Pink City.

days.title: To Shimla
days.description: Drive or toy train up to Shimla.
suggestedActivities: Toy train or drive to Shimla

days.title: Shimla to Manali
days.description: Shimla sights, then scenic drive to Manali.

days.title: Manali & Solang Valley
days.description: The old town, temples and Solang Valley.

days.title: Rohtang / Atal Tunnel
days.description: A high-altitude excursion (season and permits permitting).

days.title: Depart
days.description: Descend to Chandigarh for your onward flight.

hotelOptions.heading: Choose Your Comfort Level
hotelOptions.subheading: Centrally located hotels with easy access to the main sights. Pick the tier that suits your style.

whyBook.heading: Monuments and Mountains, the Grand Tour
whyBook.body: Linking the Golden Triangle with the Himachal hills over ten days takes expert routing across plains and mountain roads. We handle it all, including permits and the toy train. Dhesu has run North India tours for over 35 years.

points.title: MATTA & IATA Registered
points.body: Fully licensed Malaysian travel agency. We guide you through India e-Visa documentation with every booking.

points.title: Private Tours, Daily Departures
points.body: No minimum group to wait for. Your trip runs on your dates, your pace, your own vehicle and guide.

points.title: A Real Team to Call
points.body: Reachable throughout your trip. Flight delayed, your guide waits. Plans change, we adapt on the ground.

points.title: Group & Custom Pricing
points.body: Travelling as a family or group lowers the per-person cost. Ask us for a tailored quote.

sections.heading: Golden Triangle & Manali Tour from Malaysia
sections.body:
This 10 day grand tour combines the monumental Golden Triangle with the Himachal hills of Shimla and Manali, giving you India's greatest monuments plus a proper Himalayan adventure.

A private vehicle and driver guide link the plains and the hills, with the Kalka-Shimla toy train and Solang Valley along the way.

It is ideal for travellers who want both the iconic monuments and the snow peaks and high passes of the mountains, all in one trip.

sections.heading: From the Plains to the High Passes
sections.body:
This tour offers remarkable variety: the Mughal monuments and Rajput forts of the Golden Triangle, the colonial charm of Shimla, and the snow peaks, hot springs and high passes of Manali.

The ten-day pace lets you enjoy each region properly, with the scenic drives and the toy train as experiences in themselves, from the heat of the plains to the cool of the high Himalayas.

items.question: Do Malaysians need a visa for India?
items.answer: Yes. Malaysian passport holders apply for an India e-Visa online before departure. The tourist e-Visa covers tourism and short visits and is valid for 30 days from entry. The application is on the official India e-Visa portal, and Dhesu walks you through it when you book. Visa fees are not included in the package price.

items.question: Which airport does this trip use?
items.answer: This is a land-only package: hotels, transfers, tours and guide are included, but international flights are not. Most Malaysian travellers fly from Kuala Lumpur International Airport (KLIA) to Delhi and Chandigarh Airports (DEL / IXC). We can recommend suitable flights and timings on request.

items.question: What is the best time for this trip?
items.answer: October to March suits the Golden Triangle, while the Himachal hills are best March to June and snowy December to February. Spring and autumn offer good weather across both the plains and the hills, making them the best windows.

items.question: Is the Rohtang Pass guaranteed?
items.answer: No. Rohtang Pass is seasonal and requires permits, usually open from around May to October, weather permitting. The Atal Tunnel offers year-round access to the Lahaul valley. We arrange the best available high-altitude excursion for your dates.

items.question: How much driving is involved?
items.answer: This is a long tour spanning the plains and the mountains, so there are several scenic drives. The ten-day pace keeps each day comfortable, and the drives, including the toy train and the Kullu Valley route, are part of the experience.

cta.heading: Ready for the grand tour?
